faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about FluxTurn. Can't find what you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to our support team.

whatIs.question: What is FluxTurn and how does it work?
whatIs.answer: FluxTurn is a powerful workflow automation platform that lets you connect your apps and automate repetitive tasks without coding. Using our visual drag-and-drop builder, you can create workflows that trigger automatically based on events, schedules, or manual activation. Simply connect your apps, define your logic, and let FluxTurn handle the rest.

codingSkills.question: Do I need coding skills to use FluxTurn?
codingSkills.answer: No coding skills are required! FluxTurn features an intuitive visual workflow builder where you can drag and drop nodes, connect them, and configure actions through simple forms. However, for advanced users, we also support custom JavaScript and Python code execution within workflows for maximum flexibility.

integrations.question: What apps and services can I connect?
integrations.answer: FluxTurn integrates with 100+ popular apps including Gmail, Slack, Google Sheets, Telegram, Discord, Stripe, Shopify, OpenAI, databases like PostgreSQL and MongoDB, and many more. We're constantly adding new integrations based on user requests.

freePlan.question: Is there a free plan available?
freePlan.answer: Yes! We offer a generous free tier that includes up to 500 workflow executions per month, access to all integrations, and the ability to create unlimited workflows. It's perfect for personal projects and small teams getting started with automation.

selfHost.question: Can I self-host FluxTurn on my own servers?
selfHost.answer: Absolutely! FluxTurn offers both cloud-hosted and self-hosted options. Our self-hosted solution gives you complete control over your data and infrastructure. It's ideal for enterprises with strict compliance requirements or teams who prefer to manage their own deployment.

security.question: How secure is my data with FluxTurn?
security.answer: Security is our top priority. We use bank-level AES-256 encryption for all data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. Your credentials are encrypted and never stored in plain text. We also offer SOC2 compliance, role-based access controls, and audit logs for enterprise customers.

failedWorkflow.question: What happens if a workflow fails?
failedWorkflow.answer: FluxTurn provides comprehensive error handling and monitoring. When a workflow fails, you'll receive instant notifications via email or your preferred channel. Our detailed execution logs help you identify and fix issues quickly. You can also configure automatic retries and fallback actions for critical workflows.

aiWorkflows.question: Can I use AI in my workflows?
aiWorkflows.answer: Yes! FluxTurn has built-in AI capabilities powered by OpenAI, Anthropic, and other leading AI providers. You can use AI to generate content, analyze data, make decisions, classify information, and much more. Our AI Agent nodes make it easy to add intelligence to any workflow.
